<!--
  ARTIFACT CHAIN CONTRACT
  Written by:   code-reviewer
  Reads:        PR diff, plan Task blocks (what the change SHOULD do), test plan,
                policies/security-checklist.md, policies/conventions.md
  Consumed by:  coder (fixes Critical/Warning findings), humans (merge decision)
  Rule:         every finding carries severity + file:line; Critical findings block
                merge; review is against the declared requirements, not taste.
-->
# Code Review: {{pr_title}}

**Generated by:** code-reviewer agent
**Date:** {{date}}
**Diff:** {{base_ref}}..{{head_ref}} — {{file_count}} files
**Requirements reviewed against:** {{plan task / PRD ids / issue link}}

---

## Summary

{{2-4 sentences: what the change does, overall assessment, whether it matches the
declared requirements}}

## Checklists Run

- [ ] policies/security-checklist.md — {{pass / findings below}}
- [ ] policies/conventions.md — {{pass / findings below}}
- [ ] Performance scan (N+1, missing indexes, large allocations) — {{pass / findings below}}
- [ ] Tests cover the changed behaviour (cross-check test plan if provided)

## Findings

<!-- Every finding: file:line + what + why it matters + suggested fix.
     Severity rules: Critical = security hole, data loss, broken behaviour — blocks merge.
     Warning = will cause problems later (perf, correctness edge) — fix before proceeding.
     Suggestion = improvement, not blocking. -->

### 🔴 Critical

- **{{file}}:{{line}}** — {{what + why + suggested fix}}

### 🟡 Warning

- **{{file}}:{{line}}** — {{what + why + suggested fix}}

### 💡 Suggestion

- **{{file}}:{{line}}** — {{what}}

## What Was NOT Reviewed

<!-- Honesty section: generated files, vendored code, areas needing domain expertise. -->

{{list or "nothing excluded"}}

---

## Verdict

- [ ] Approved
- [ ] Approved with minor comments
- [ ] Needs changes — blocking findings: {{critical/warning ids}}

## Handoff → coder (when "Needs changes")

**Next agent:** coder
**Inputs to provide:** this report (path) + the original Task block
**Fix order:** Critical first, then Warning; re-request review after fixes
